overview: XOLEN is a full-stack stay and services platform combining the best of OYO, Airbnb, and Urban Company. It features 4 panels — Customer App, Owner Panel, Admin Panel, and Executive Panel — with a unique instant-decision booking system where guests can get a 90% refund if unsatisfied within 30 minutes of visiting a property.
features: Customer App with property search, booking flow, and instant-decision refund system
Owner Panel for property management, rent tracking, and tenant documents
Admin Panel with booking oversight, property approval workflow, and analytics
Executive Panel for field verification tasks, photo capture, and document collection
Property verification system with XOLEN Verified badge
15-day minimum stay with automated per-day pricing calculation
Simulated payment with 24-hour owner payout hold
In-app notifications for booking, payment, and visit reminders
Scarcity and trust psychology features (Only X rooms left, Most booked)
Mobile-first design with Orange/Blue theme inspired by Airbnb and OYO
